free_text: Measurements and calculations of neutron spectra from
35 MeV deuterons on thick lithium for the FMIT facility
Measurements were performed using the
isochronous cyclotron of the Crocker Nuclear
Laboratory of the University of California at Davis.
Natural Li target with diameter of 25 mm and
thickness of 20 mm
Neutrons were detected by an NE213
scintillator that was 51 mm thick x 51 mm diameter.
Neutron energy determination was by the
time of flight method with gamma ray background
rejected by pulse shape discrimination.
The experimental spectrum has
uncertainties currently estimated at about 20%
(1 sigma).
Compiled by S.H.
SD: volume of the ref. corrected.
BP: Updated entry, corrected second update
time stamp, added doi and sub.3, ERR-ANALYS.
Fig. 2, page 469 of J,JNM,85-86,467,1979. Regular grid
was superimposed on the fig.2. Data values were
digitized on grid points.
BP: Reaction string correction, added
DATA-ERR.
